signals.headline: Geopolitical Tensions (US/Iran/Israel Strikes) Trigger Altcoin Sell-Off | NO | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Geopolitical Tensions (US/Iran/Israel Strikes) Trigger Altcoin Sell-Off | NO | HIGH**  
Recent US/Israel strikes on Iran caused sharp drops—ETH to $1,840 (-5.2%), XRP to $1.30 (-6.6%), SOL -3.5%—with BTC resilient above $64K; no new resolutions, just ongoing volatility.[5][6]
